items.q: Name the tv show that features the character Ted Mosby.
items.explanation: Ted Mosby is strongly linked to How I Met Your Mother.

items.q: Name the tv show that features the character Billy Butcher.
items.explanation: Billy Butcher is strongly linked to The Boys.

items.q: The character Ted Lasso appears in Dexter.
items.explanation: Ted Lasso appears in Ted Lasso, not Dexter.

items.q: Name the tv show that features the character Geralt of Rivia.
items.explanation: Geralt of Rivia is strongly linked to The Witcher.

items.q: Which character is strongly associated with the tv show Lupin?
items.explanation: Assane Diop is one of the defining characters in Lupin.

items.q: Name the tv show that features the character Queen Elizabeth II.
items.explanation: Queen Elizabeth II is strongly linked to The Crown.

items.q: Which character is strongly associated with the tv show The Office (US)?
items.explanation: Michael Scott is one of the defining characters in The Office (US).

items.q: Which tv show features the character Sheldon Cooper?
items.explanation: Sheldon Cooper is associated with The Big Bang Theory.

items.q: Which character is strongly associated with the tv show Narcos?
items.explanation: Pablo Escobar is one of the defining characters in Narcos.

items.q: The character Leslie Knope appears in Parks and Recreation.
items.explanation: Leslie Knope is a key character in Parks and Recreation.
